Mexico vs South Africa - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
description: Mexico and South Africa will repeat the opening fixture of the 2010 FIFA World Cup – exactly 16 years after their 1-1 draw in Johannesburg. It’s the first time an opening fixture has ever been repeated from the 19 previous single-match World Cup openers. Estadio Azteca is hosting its 20th FIFA World Cup match, more than any other stadium in the his

title: South Korea vs Czech Republic - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
description: This will be the first FIFA World Cup encounter between Korea Republic and Czechia. Their three previous meetings all came in friendlies, resulting in one win apiece and one draw. The most recent clash occurred a decade ago in June 2016, a 2-1 victory for Korea Republic in Prague. This will be Korea Republic’s 12th FIFA World Cup tournament, the mo

title: United States vs Paraguay - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
description: This will be the second FIFA World Cup meeting between the United States and Paraguay. Their only previous encounter came in 1930, when USA won 3-0 – a match that featured the first hat-trick in World Cup history, scored by Bert Patenaude. It is also the USA’s joint-largest win at the competition. The 2026 FIFA World Cup will be the USA’s 12th appe

title: Qatar vs Switzerland - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
description: This will be Qatar and Switzerland’s first FIFA World Cup meeting. Their only previous encounter came in a November 2018 friendly in Lugano – Qatar won 1-0 thanks to an Akram Afif goal. This will be Qatar’s second FIFA World Cup, but it’s the first time they had to qualify for the tournament – their previous participation in 2022 came as hosts. The

title: Brazil vs Morocco - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
description: Brazil and Morocco will meet at the FIFA World Cup for the second time, after a 3-0 win for Brazil in the 1998 group stage – a match that featured Ronaldo and Rivaldo’s first World Cup goals. Brazil and Morocco’s only encounter since their last FIFA World Cup meeting was in a March 2023 friendly, in Tunisia – it ended 2-1 to Morocco.

title: France vs Senegal - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
description: France and Senegal are meeting at the FIFA World Cup for the second time. Their first encounter came in the 2002 group stage where Senegal won 1-0 in their first ever World Cup match, while it’s also the last time France lost their opening match at the tournament. France have lost three of their last four FIFA World Cup group matches against Africa

title: England vs Croatia - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
description: England and Croatia are meeting at the FIFA World Cup for the second time. Their first encounter came in the semi-final of the 2018 tournament – Croatia won 2-1 after extra-time. This is the fourth match between England and Croatia at a major tournament this century – twice at the FIFA World Cup and twice at the UEFA European Championship. Sweden

title: New Zealand vs Egypt - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
description: This will be New Zealand and Egypt’s first World Cup meeting – it will also be New Zealand’s first World Cup match against a team from Africa. title: Ecuador vs Germany - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
description: Germany have won their two previous encounters with Ecuador - 3-0 in the group stage of the 2006 World Cup and 4-2 in a May 2013 friendly which was played in Boca Raton, Florida. Six of Germany’s seven goals against Ecuador have come in the first half, including Lukas Podolski scoring after nine seconds in their last meeting in May 2013.
